titlestmt.titleproper: Ben Grauer collection of French music correspondence8434

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-09-19 18:42:54 UTC.

ead.archdesc:
======= RMM08434Ben Grauer collection of French music correspondence8434Compiled by RMC StaffDivision of Rare and Manuscript Collections
March 20142B Carl A. Kroch LibraryCornell UniversityIthaca, NY 14853rareref@cornell.eduURL:
finartThis finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-09-19 19:09:34 UTC.12/07/2018
This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor) >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Ben Grauer collection of French music correspondence
Grauer, Ben
8434
1.3 cubic feet. 1.3 cubic feet.
1835-1915. Correspondence, manuscripts, newspapers. Collection consists of correspondence between French composers and musicians, mostly from the nineteenth century. Collection material in French 8296825
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
RMC Staff
Date completed:
April 2014
EAD encoding:
Jude Corina, April 2014
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Collection consists of correspondence between 19th and early 20th century French composers, librettists and musicians (including Fromental Halévy, Jean-François Le Sueur, Jules Massenet, Eugène Scribe, Florent Schmitt, and others). Many of the letters are addressed to musicologist Georges Servières (1858 - 1937). Also includes music manuscripts, programs, engravings, and clippings.
Cite As:
Ben Grauer collection of French music correspondence, #8434. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
France -- Intellectual life -- 19th century. Musicians -- France -- 19th century. Composers -- France -- 19th century. Music -- France -- 19th century. Halévy, F., 1799-1862. Kalkbrenner, Friedrich Wilhelm Michael, 1785-1849. Le Sueur, 1760-1837. Marchesi, Mathilde, 1821-1913. Massenet, Jules, 1842-1912. Moscheles, Ignaz, 1794-1870. Schmitt, Florent, 1870-1958. Scribe, Eugène, 1791-1861. Servières, Georges, 1858-1937. Widor, Charles-Marie, 1844-1937.
